sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: UPS는 수익성 중심의 전략적 물량 조정으로 매출 214억 1,500만 달러를 기록하며 체질 개선을 지속하고 있습니다.

keyPoints.text: 수익성이 높은 물량에 집중하기 위해 최대 고객사의 물량을 2026년 6월까지 2024년 대비 50% 이상 감축하는 전략을 실행 중입니다.
기존 SurePost 서비스를 내재화하고 새로운 국내 경제형 서비스인 Ground Saver를 도입하여 서비스 포트폴리오를 재편했습니다.
헬스케어 및 중소기업(SMB) 시장 등 매력적인 부문에서의 성장을 목표로 하는 'Customer First, People Led, Innovation Driven' 전략을 유지하고 있습니다.

riskChanges.text: 2024년 연례 보고서에 기재된 위험 요인 외에 중대한 변경 사항은 없으나, 기존 위험 요소들이 재무 상태 및 운영 결과에 여전히 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다.
알려지지 않았거나 현재 중요하지 않다고 판단되는 사건 및 불확실성으로 인해 사업 및 신용 등급에 부정적인 영향을 받을 가능성이 존재합니다.

financialHighlights.text: 3분기 매출은 214억 1,500만 달러, 영업이익은 18억 400만 달러를 기록하며 영업이익률 8.4%를 달성했습니다.
순이익은 13억 1,100만 달러이며, 총자산 713억 9,200만 달러와 현금및현금성자산 67억 6,400만 달러를 보유하고 있습니다.

watchItems.text: 최대 고객사 물량 축소에 따른 단기 매출 감소가 불가피한 상황에서, 고수익 물량 확보를 통한 영업이익률 회복 속도가 향후 주가 및 실적 개선의 핵심 지표가 될 것입니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Quarter ended 2025-09-30 revenue = 214억 1,500만 달러 (USD 21.415B; 21,415 million), XBRL range 2025-07-01..2025-09-30.
Quarter ended 2025-09-30 operating income = 18억 400만 달러 (USD 1.804B; 1,804 million), XBRL range 2025-07-01..2025-09-30.
Quarter ended 2025-09-30 net income = 13억 1,100만 달러 (USD 1.311B; 1,311 million), XBRL range 2025-06-30..2025-09-30. (quarter derived: YTD 2025-09-30 minus YTD 2025-06-30)
Quarter ended 2025-09-30 total assets = 713억 9,200만 달러 (USD 71.392B; 71,392 million), XBRL range instant..2025-09-30.
Quarter ended 2025-09-30 cash and cash equivalents = 67억 6,400만 달러 (USD 6.764B; 6,764 million), XBRL range instant..2025-09-30.

Item 1A. Risk Factors There have been no material changes to the risk factors described in Part 1, Item 1A in our Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year ended December 31, 2024. The occurrence of any of the risks described therein could materially affect us, including impacting our business, financial condition, results of operations, stock price or credit rating, as well as our reputation. These risks are not the only ones we face. We could also be materially adversely affected by other events, factors or uncertainties that are unknown to us, or that we do not currently consider to be material. 73 Table of Contents Item 2. Unregistered Sales of Equity Securities and Use of Proceeds In January 2023, the Board of Directors approved a share repurchase authorization of $5.0 billion for class A and class B common stock. We repurchased 8.6 million shares of class B common stock for $1.0  Normalized numeric aliases: $5.0 billion = 50억 달러; 8.6 million = 860만 달러; $5.0 = 5.0달러; $1.0 = 1.0달러.

Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations Overview We continue to execute our Customer First, People Led and Innovation Driven strategy to grow in the most attractive parts of the market including healthcare, small and medium-sized businesses ("SMBs") and International. During the third quarter and first nine months ( the "year-to-date") periods of 2025, we took several steps in furtherance of this strategy, including continuing our deliberate shift in our business to increase our focus on higher yielding volume. As previously disclosed, we intend to reduce volume from our largest customer by more than 50% by June 2026 from 2024 levels. Overview We continue to execute our Customer First, People Led and Innovation Driven strategy to grow in the most attractive parts of the market including healthcare, small and medium-sized businesses ("SMBs") and International. During the third quarter and first nine months ( the "year-to-date") periods of 2025, we took several steps in furtherance of this strategy, including continuing our deliberate shift in our business to increase our focus on higher yielding volume. As previously disclosed, we intend to reduce volume from our largest customer by more than 50% by June 2026 from 2024 levels. In the first half of 2025, we insourced our former SurePost product, using the UPS network for final mile delivery, and have since replaced it with Ground Saver, a new domestic economy service meant to complement our array of products used by our customers.
